  • Uses of Vector in geometries.api

    Methods in geometries.api that return Vector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Vector
    Geometry.getNormal(Point point)
    Returns the normal vector to the geometry at the given point.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Vector
    Vector.AXIS_Z
    Unit vector in the positive Z-axis direction.
    Methods in primitives that return Vector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Vector
    Vector.add(Vector other)
    Adds another vector to this vector.
    Vector
    Vector.crossProduct(Vector other)
    Computes the cross product of this vector with another vector.
    Vector
    Ray.getDirection()
    Returns the normalized direction vector of the ray.
    Vector
    Vector.normalize()
    Returns a normalized version of this vector.
    Vector
    Vector.scale(double scalar)
    Scales this vector by a scalar value.
    Vector
    Point.subtract(Point other)
    Subtracts another point from this point and returns the vector from the other point to this point.
    Methods in primitives with parameters of type Vector
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Point
    Point.add(Vector vector)
    Adds a vector to this point.
    Vector
    Vector.add(Vector other)
    Adds another vector to this vector.
    Vector
    Vector.crossProduct(Vector other)
    Computes the cross product of this vector with another vector.
    double
    Vector.distance(Vector other)
    Computes the distance between this vector and another vector.
    double
    Vector.distanceSquared(Vector other)
    Computes the squared distance between this vector and another vector.
    double
    Vector.dotProduct(Vector other)
    Computes the dot product of this vector with another vector.

    Constructor
    Description
     
    Ray(Point origin, Vector direction)
    Constructs a ray with origin point and direction vector.
